Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Index Of Federal Authorities
Off Calendar Apr-18-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Leslie V. Freeman, Esq., of Weinberg, Roger & Rosenfeld, Tel. 510.337.1001, appearing for Petitioner and moving party.

No other appearance. PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS VACATION HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; AND CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; and NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
